Our Activities
Pick Your Adventure

Something thrilling for everyone — from competitive games to creative fun and everything in between.

🎯

Paintball

Gear up and battle it out on our paintball field. The ultimate team experience for any occasion.

Fan Favourite
🏹

Archery

Test your focus and precision with our supervised archery range. Fun for beginners and enthusiasts.

All Skill Levels
🎨

Paint & Sip

A creative, relaxed experience. Paint, unwind and enjoy — perfect for dates and group outings.

Relaxed Vibes
🛸

Hover Ride

Glide on our hover rides — a unique, exciting activity that keeps everyone smiling.

Crowd Pleaser
♟️

Table & Board Games

Classic and modern board games in a lively space. Great for families and casual hangouts.
